1: -module(basic_SUITE).
    2: -include_lib("common_test/include/ct.hrl").
    3: -export([all/0]).
    4: -export([
    5:     test1/1,
    6:     test2/1
    7: ]).
    8: 
    9: all() -> [test1, test2].
   10: 
   11: test1(_Config) ->
   12:     1 = 1.
   13: 
   14: test2(_Config) ->
   15:     A = 0,
   16:     1 / A.
